title: One dead and two ill after meningitis cases
snippet: Agencies said the risk to pupils and the wider public following the cases of meningitis remains low.

title: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
snippet: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.

title: HMRC to use AI from British tech firm to spot fraud and tax return errors
snippet: Quantexa, a financial data platform, won the £175m contract to spot fraud and tax return errors.

title: 'I've never seen anything like this': Councillors report rise in abuse
snippet: Councillors tell of the abuse they faced from the public in recent weeks. Why is it on the rise?

title: 'We're living in a shed because of river pollution'
snippet: Jane and Tony Coyle spent seven years waiting for planning permission due to River Lugg pollution.

title: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks but no deals confirmed
snippet: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no trade breakthroughs after the two-day visit.

title: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
snippet: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.

title: 'Don't swim' at 12 of 14 river bathing sites, as more locations announced
snippet: Too much bacteria linked to faeces found at almost all England's designated river bathing sites

title: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
snippet: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.

title: Posh sandwich has more salt than nearly five cheeseburgers
snippet: Action on Salt & Sugar said people should not be exposed to a "hidden health risk every time they buy lunch".

title: Search for new James Bond officially kicks off as auditions begin
snippet: Callum Turner, Jacob Elordi and Harris Dickinson are among the frontrunners to replace Daniel Craig.

title: Beckhams become billionaires as Oasis make rich list for first time
snippet: The list is based off the paper's estimates of the minimum wealth of Britain’s 350 richest people or families.

title: Carrick future to be decided 'pretty soon' amid contract talks
snippet: Manchester United head coach Michael Carrick says his future will be decided soon amid contract talks.

title: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister
snippet: The prime minister is fighting to stay on in No 10 as heavy election losses trigger a Labour revolt.

title: Harry and Meghan to produce Afghan war film for Netflix
snippet: The couple's production company will make a film based on a true story of British troops under siege.
